title: Software configuration and version documented
description: Software configuration and version information for equipment controlling quality-affecting functions are documented and controlled.
equipment_types: CMM;Optical Measurement System;Particle Counter;Universal Testing Machine
verification_expectation: Verify that software configuration version and SOUP (where applicable) are documented and subject to change control.

rationale: IEC 62304 requires configuration management for medical device software.
